children.text: Activities authorized under part A of subchapter I.
Activities authorized under part A of subchapter II.
Activities authorized under part A of subchapter IV.

children.heading: Administrative costs
children.label: b Administrative costs
children.text: A State educational agency receiving a grant under this subpart may not use more than 5 percent of the amount of the grant for State administrative costs and to provide technical assistance to eligible local educational agencies.
